description: Get current weather information for a specific city.

city.description: Name of the city to get weather for

returns.description: Current weather data including temperature, conditions, humidity, wind, etc.

description: Get weather forecast for a specific city.

city.description: Name of the city to get forecast for

days.description: Number of days to forecast (1-10, default: 3)

returns.description: Weather forecast data for the specified number of days

query.description: Location name or partial name to search for

returns.description: List of matching locations with their details

description: Legacy tool: Get current temperature for a city (for backward compatibility). Use get_current_weather_tool for more detailed information.

city.description: Name of the city to get current temperature for
